_comment: Synthetic ICICI savings/current bank-account golden vector (no real data). Ported from the web engine's icici_bank.py (BalanceLedgerStatementReader) — a Withdrawal/Deposit/running-Balance ledger with NO Dr/Cr marker; direction is derived from the running-balance delta and the printed amount is an independent integrity check (amount == |balance delta|). Values captured from a live run of the web reader + balance_chain.check (RECONCILED). Row-1 is anchored by the printed Opening Balance (geometry-free, so first_row_words is empty).
